title: Amtech P1800 Surveyor Tape, 30m (Pack of 3)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
VERSATILE: This 30m x 12mm fibreglass surveyor's tape has both metric and imperial graduations for convenience
DURABLE AND EASY TO USE: With a tough, ergonomically designed outer casing for ease of use, it has a hard wearing metal ring at the end of the tape for attachment
WORKSHOP FRIENDLY: Ideal for home use or trade environments
STABLE OPERATION: Designed to minimise movement during cutting tasks
TIME SAVING: Enhances productivity through fast and accurate cutting
description: From the brand Previous page DK Tools Limited is the company behind the Amtech brand and we began over 30 years ago as a small, family-run market stall in West London. In fact, the stall still exists and is now run by one of our longest serving customers! We are proud to have grown into one of the most successful British DIY and Home Improvement companies on the market, with our Amtech brand and product proposition being endorsed by The Telegraph Business Club.
